chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1909 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.11.2025 Petitioners are present in person Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w Inspector Siraj Shaikh, SHO of P.S Tando Muhammad Khan SIP Mushtaque and Inspector Manzoor Ali Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G Sindh Private respondent Faizan Lal in person *** SHO of P.S Tando Muhammad Khan SIP Mushtaque has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR bearing Crime No.414 of 2025 registered at P.S City Kotri Azad Jamu & Kashmir and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage of free-will with petitioner No.2. She further states that presently they are resident at Tando Muhammad Khan, however, due to registration of aforesaid FIR the local police is causing them undue harassment at the behest of private respondents. On being confronted the SHO of PS Tando Muhammad Khan denied the allegations and undertakes that petitioners will be provided due protection strictly in accordance with law and no harassment will be caused to them. While the private respondent Faizan Lal submits that they are ready to furnish Personal Bond to the effect that no harm shall be caused to the petitioners. Since the subject FIR pertains to Azad Jamu & Kashmir, therefore, this petition is disposed of with directions to SSP Tando Muhammad Khan to ensure legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. However, office is directed to send a copy of this Order alongwith photocopy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded today by the SHO P.S Tando Muhammad Khan to SSP Kotli AJ&K for further necessary action in accordance with law and submit report before the concerned Magistrate for appropriate orders.

Since the subject FIR pertains to Azad Jamu & Kashmir, therefore, this petition is disposed of with directions to SSP Tando Muhammad Khan to ensure legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. However, office is directed to send a copy of this Order alongwith photocopy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded today by the SHO P.S Tando Muhammad Khan to SSP Kotli AJ&K for further necessary action in accordance with law and submit report before the concerned Magistrate for appropriate orders. A copy of this order also be communicated to SSP Tando Muhammad Khan for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
